text: Here in this modern, thoughtfully designed space, I feel a subtle thrill—stimulated by the interplay of glass, light, and vivid graphics. The words "R+D" on the wall prompt me to reflect on the continuous evolution of knowledge and the creative potential of innovation. Surrounded by artifacts and screens hinting at inquiry and discovery, I sense a connection to humanity’s collective curiosity and a gentle invitation to ponder my own place in the flow of research and design.
